title: Smaller Totem
description: Makes Totem smaller in size and low for better PvP.
body:
**Works Fine from 1.13 to 1.21.11, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
# Small Low Totem by Silent!

## 📜 Description
This resource pack makes the **Totem of Undying smaller** while holding it in your hand.  
Perfect for **PvP players** who want less screen blocking and a cleaner view.

---

## ✨ Features
- 🔹 Totem is scaled down (low size).
- 🔹 Works in **inventory and hotbar** like normal.
- 🔹 No particles or animation changes – only size reduced.

---

## 🎮 Best For
- PvP & Crystal PvP
- Survival gameplay with less screen clutter
- Players on **low-end PCs** who want better visibility

---

## ⚠️ Compatibility Note
1. Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
2. Not Tested with Mods
- Fully tested by me not works not my problem
